title: CatalogItem
description: A single deduplicated entry in the SaferSkills catalog (a skill, MCP server, hook, plugin, or rules artifact). One catalog_item per (github_url, default_branch) — sub-tree artifacts collapse into the parent repo entry.

kind.description: Artifact taxonomy. `rules` covers Cursor / Windsurf-style rule files.

slug.description: URL-safe slug of the form `<org>--<repo>` (double-dash separator). Used in `/items/<slug>` permalinks.

displayName.description: Human-facing name as resolved from the source artifact.

githubUrl.description: Canonical GitHub URL on the default branch. Null is reserved for non-GitHub sources (e.g. npm-only) — at W2 every catalog_item has a GitHub URL.

githubOrg.description: GitHub organisation or user that owns the repo.

defaultBranch.description: Repo default branch resolved at first ingestion. Used as the `ref` for tarball fetches when no SHA is pinned.

popularityTier.description: PRD §6.2 scan-tier assignment. `indexed`: metadata only. `lite`: shallow scan, weekly rescan. `deep`: full scan, hourly rescan. `on_demand`: user-submitted, hourly rescan.

popularityScore.description: Weekly-recomputed popularity rank within the artifact kind. Drives popularityTier assignment.

agentCompatibility.description: Closed-enum list of agent platforms this artifact is compatible with. Populated by a deterministic kind+manifest mapping at ingestion (see docs/methodology.md § Agent compatibility). Drives the catalog Agent-compatibility filter (array-overlap). Empty until ingestion populates.

contentHashSha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical tarball at the most recent scan. Null until first scan. Used by the hash-drift detector (SS-MCP-SUPPLY-CHAIN-HASH-DRIFT-01).

archived.description: True when the upstream repo is deleted or marked archived on GitHub. Archived items are excluded from re-scans but their last verdict stays public.

registryUrl.description: Permalink to the listing on the source registry.

firstIndexedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of first indexing from this source.

lastSeenAt.description: Most recent ingestion sweep that observed this listing.

sources.description: Source registries that contributed this item. Non-empty — an item without any source isn't catalogable.

metadata.description: Extensible bag for per-kind fields surfaced by ingestion adapters. Treat as opaque at the API boundary.
